meaning: n.(起源于拉丁美洲的)康茄舞,其曲子vi.跳康茄舞
examples: He sang his invocations in a beautiful oaken tenor with a freckle-faced boy at his side playing conga and tambourine as if it was a full drum kit.
Senorita, feel the conga, let me see you move like you come from Colombia.
"Free shots for everyone on the conga line, " booms the burly emcee from New Orleans.
Newmont Mining is keeping all options open as far as its Conga project in Peru is concerned.
The percussionists play on traditional conga drums and instruments made out of scrap metal and car parts.
